MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KEVIN L. WHEELER OF THE DUCKOR, SPRADLING, METGER & WYNNE, TEL. NO. (619) 209-3053 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. VAL HORNSTEIN, TEL. NO. 454-1490 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; Respondent'S Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award IS DENIED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
